creator: sigsys@gmail.com
text: Same thing happens for me on 12-STABLE on a Ryzen 2700.  The CPU frequency isn't going up once it has been lowered (even though it looks like it does according to that sysctl, the CPU actually remains much slower).  I haven't found any BIOS setting that fixes it.  It's on a B450 Pro4 motherboard with firmware P3.20.
